label: reject

card.title: isValidEmail() validator
card.description: Validate an email address for the signup form.
card.technicalNotes: Pure, typed. Return boolean. Reject obviously malformed addresses. Tested.
isc: Rejects strings without an '@' and a domain dot
Has unit tests covering valid and invalid inputs

iscVerdicts.criterion: Rejects strings without an '@' and a domain dot
